zh.title: Hello, Blog Framework
zh.summary: 这是一篇占位文章，用来验证博客框架已经搭建完成，后续只需要填内容即可。

en.title: Hello, Blog Framework
en.summary: This is a placeholder post to verify that the blog framework is ready and content can be added later without touching the page code.

zh.title: Why Build in Public
zh.summary: 我希望博客不仅展示结果，也记录过程，这会让项目和成长轨迹都更清楚。

en.title: Why Build in Public
en.summary: I want the blog to show not only finished work, but also the process that produced it.

zh.title: AIGril 桌宠版 V1：从网页虚拟人到常驻桌面
zh.summary: 这一版把 AIGril 正式做成了一个可常驻桌面的桌宠形态，并补齐了右键控制、托盘、语音模式切换和本地语音识别的基础链路。

en.title: AIGril Desktop Pet V1: From Web Avatar to Resident Companion
en.summary: This iteration turns AIGril into a real desktop pet with a transparent always-on-top shell, tray and context controls, speech mode switching, and a first working pass of local speech recognition.

zh.title: AIGril 的上线方式：GitHub Pages 前端加 Render 后端
zh.summary: 这篇文章记录 AIGril 如何从本地虚拟人项目变成可在线体验的前后端系统，并说明源码、体验地址和桌面包的整理方式。

en.title: How AIGril Is Deployed: GitHub Pages for the Frontend and Render for the Backend
en.summary: This post explains how AIGril moved from a local virtual-character project to a live frontend-backend system, including source code, live links, and desktop packaging notes.

zh.title: AutoResearch：把自动调研做成可追踪的研究流水线
zh.summary: 这篇文章介绍 AutoResearch 的 Phase 1 思路：用规划、检索、证据抽取、记忆和报告引擎，把自动调研从一次性总结变成可追踪的工程流水线。

en.title: AutoResearch: Turning Agentic Research into a Traceable Pipeline
en.summary: This post introduces AutoResearch as an evidence-first research pipeline built around planning, retrieval, memory, evidence extraction, and report generation.

zh.title: HaoRender-GPU：从 CPU 渲染经验走向现代 RHI 架构
zh.summary: 这篇文章介绍 HaoRender-GPU 如何从独立工程起步，以 OpenGL triangle 为最小闭环，逐步走向 D3D12/Vulkan 风格的现代 RHI 架构。

en.title: HaoRender-GPU: From CPU Rendering Experience to a Modern RHI Roadmap
en.summary: This post introduces HaoRender-GPU as a separate modern rendering track that starts with OpenGL samples and moves toward a D3D12/Vulkan-shaped RHI architecture.

zh.title: Multi-Codex Orchestrator：把多 Agent 协作变成可验证的 Patch 流水线
zh.summary: 这篇文章介绍 Multi-Codex Orchestrator 如何用 Manager/Worker/Repair/Conflict Resolver、git worktree 和结构化工件，把多 Agent 编程变成可验证的 patch 流水线。

en.title: Multi-Codex Orchestrator: Turning Multi-Agent Coding into a Verifiable Patch Pipeline
en.summary: This post explains how Multi-Codex Orchestrator uses manager-worker roles, git worktrees, structured artifacts, repair loops, and deterministic validation to coordinate parallel coding agents.

en.summary: This post uses haorender's README and CMake configuration to explain how the project frames CPU rasterization as a Qt-based desktop rendering workbench with material inspection, shadows, profiling, and portable packaging.
